top_flood_entry.name: FEMA National Flood Hazard Layer (NFHL) — ArcGIS REST
top_flood_entry.description: FEMA Flood Insurance Rate Map (FIRM) digital database with 31 feature layers: flood hazard zones (AE, VE, X, etc.), base flood elevations, cross-sections, FIRM panels, LOMRs/LOMAs, levees, coastal transects. Authoritative source for regulatory flood zones in the US.
top_flood_entry.citation: FEMA, National Flood Hazard Layer (NFHL). Accessed via https://hazards.fema.gov/arcgis/rest/services/public/NFHL/MapServer. Accessed 2026-06-07.
top_flood_entry.how_to_use:
Base URL: https://hazards.fema.gov/arcgis/rest/services/public/NFHL/MapServer
Layer 28: Flood Hazard Zones (FLD_ZONE, FLD_ZONE_SUBTY fields).
Query example (ensure correct where clause format):
  /MapServer/28/query?where=FLD_ZONE+%3C%3E+%27AREA+NOT+INCLUDED%27
  &geometry=<bbox>&geometryType=esriGeometryEnvelope&inSR=4326
  &outFields=FLD_ZONE,FLD_ZONE_SUBTY&f=json
Key flood zones: AE=100-yr with BFE, X=500-yr/0.2%, VE=coastal wave,
D=undetermined. For WMS visualization: WMS endpoint at same base path
(append /MapServer/WMSServer?service=WMS&request=GetCapabilities).

top_dem_entry.name: Copernicus DEM GLO-30 (Microsoft Planetary Computer STAC)
top_dem_entry.description: Global 30-meter digital surface model derived from TanDEM-X radar satellite data. Covers the entire Earth (-180 to 180°, -90 to 90°). Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF tiles queryable via STAC. Preferred global DEM when 3DEP coverage is absent (international locations, offshore areas).
top_dem_entry.license: Proprietary — Copernicus DEM license (free for most uses; see ESA Mission-specific Annex)
top_dem_entry.citation: European Space Agency (licensor), Sinergise (producer). Copernicus Digital Elevation Model (GLO-30). Hosted by Microsoft Planetary Computer. DOI: 10.5069/G9028PQB (OpenTopography). Accessed 2026-06-07.
top_dem_entry.how_to_use:
Use pystac-client to query: Client.open("https://planetarycomputer.microsoft.com/api/stac/v1")
then search collection="cop-dem-glo-30" with bbox and datetime. Assets key
"data" yields the COG href. HTTP Range is supported — use rasterio + GDAL
/vsicurl/ for windowed reads. Resolution is ~30m GSD. CRS is EPSG:4326.
Note: the GLO-30 license permits free use including commercial; read the
Copernicus DEM License Summary before redistribution.
